projects.title: Terra — Personal Finance Dashboard
projects.description: A calm, focused dashboard for tracking spending and savings goals. Built with an emphasis on clarity and gentle, earthy visual design.

projects.title: Fieldnotes
projects.description: A note-taking app for people who think outdoors. Offline-first, fast capture, and a tactile reading experience.

projects.title: Open Trail Map
projects.description: A community-maintained map of hiking trails with crowd-sourced conditions and photos. Contributed mapping and design.

projects.title: Clay & Co. Brand System
projects.description: A full visual identity for a ceramics studio — logo, type system, packaging, and a small storefront site.

projects.title: Harvest CLI
projects.description: A command-line tool that automates repetitive build tasks for small teams. Lightweight, scriptable, well-documented.

projects.title: Quiet Hours
projects.description: A generative ambient-sound web toy that builds evolving soundscapes from earthy field recordings.
